data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of locking the invoice currency after confirmation. However, the evidence only shows transactions in USD without any indication of a locked conversion rate or the currency being locked at the time of confirmation. This indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, as the necessary evidence to confirm the currency lock is absent.
gaps: No evidence of invoice currency lock after confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
